steps.title: Concede before explaining
steps.content: The passage acknowledges that Alkaid is less bright than Gamma Velorum, then explains why Alkaid is still bright enough to rank among the top 50: it is relatively close to Earth. The transition needs to concede the previous point.

steps.title: Reject the wrong relationship
steps.content: Choice A reinforces a point instead of conceding one. Choice C creates a false cause-and-effect relationship. Choice D signals similarity, but the passage contrasts the two stars before explaining Alkaid's brightness. The answer is B.
